1.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Trondheim%';

1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Trondheim municipality

2.description: inspect distinct skredrisikokvikkleireklasse values in quick-clay areas

3.description: select quick-clay hazard polygons with the chosen high-risk class (will use value from step 2)

4.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to those intersecting Trondheim municipality geometry (municipality from step 1 + kvikkleire from step 3)

5.description: select buildings in Trondheim by kommunenummer (use kommunenummer from step 1)

6.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced quick-clay polygons (buildings step 5 with kvikkleire reduced step 4)

7.description: collapse to one row per building (group by bygningid) to avoid duplicates
